title: Contacts
drDigitalIntro: Before you send messages, you need contacts — a list of people and their phone numbers or email addresses. The Contacts list lets you create and organize contact information. Each contact has a name and can have phone numbers, email addresses, and notes. Once someone is a contact, messaging apps can find them easily. Let's practice selecting contacts.

playgroundTask.goal: You browsed your contacts and opened a conversation

steps.say: Click on Alex in the contacts list to open their conversation.
Now click on Grandma to switch to her conversation.
Send Grandma a reply. Click the message box, type 'I miss you too' and click Send.

drDigitalSuccess: You selected contacts and sent a message! That's how you navigate between conversations — just click any contact to switch.
drDigitalHint: Click the contact's name in the left sidebar to open their conversation.
